recommendations.title: Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A couple are given a camera and a set of instructions which they must follow or else someone will die.

recommendations.title: The Monster
recommendations.overview: A mother and her 10-year old daughter are trapped in a forest. There is something in this forest. Something unlike anything they have heard before. Something that lurks in the darkness and it’s coming after them.

recommendations.title: Vicious
recommendations.overview: When Polly receives a mysterious box, it comes with one rule: place inside something she needs, something she hates, and something she loves. If she doesn’t obey, it will consume everything—and everyone—she’s ever known.

recommendations.title: The Strangers
recommendations.overview: After a 4 a.m. knock at the door and haunting voices, Kristen McKay and James Hoyt’s remote getaway becomes a psychological night of terror as three masked strangers invade. Now they must go far beyond what they thought themselves capable of if they

recommendations.title: Sinister 2
recommendations.overview: A young mother and her twin sons move into a rural house that's marked for death.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: Teddy
recommendations.overview: In a rural French town, twenty-something Teddy is scratched by an unknown beast and slowly undergoes frightening changes.

recommendations.title: Oracle
recommendations.overview: A young woman accepts a job on a property with a traumatic history. Upon her arrival, she soon realizes that the nightmares of her childhood are connected to the evil in the house.

recommendations.title: In the Name of the Land
recommendations.overview: Pierre is 25 when he returns from Wyoming to his fiancée and take over the family farm. Twenty years later, the farm expanded and so did the family. It's the time of happy days, at least at the beginning. The debts accumulate and Pierre is exhausted

recommendations.title: Baby Blues
recommendations.overview: On a secluded family farm, a mother suffers a psychotic break due to postpartum depression, forcing the eldest son to protect his sibling from the mother they have always known and loved.
